semanticCore: Blemish, color spot, marking, ornamentation, embroidery, or slanderous reporting
quranicRelevance: No blemish on it (Shiah - 'la shiyata feeha').

keyDerivations.meaning: Blemish, spot of a different color, marking, or patch of coloration

figurativeOrRareUsages: قَالَ إِنَّهُ يَقُولُ إِنَّهَا بَقَرَةٌ لَا ذَلُولٌ تُثِيرُ الْأَرْضَ ... مُسَلَّمَةٌ لَا شِيَةَ فِيهَا (2:71): 'He says: She is a cow neither trained to plow the earth... sound, having no blemish/spot of different color on her.'
discardedNoise: Washi (slanderer/tale-bearer) - though classically from the same root (embellishing words), secondary here.
summaryEn: The root means color spots or blemishes (Washing/Shiah), specifying that the golden cow demanded of the Israelites had to be of pure, solid color without any patches of black or white.
summaryAr: يمثل هذا الجذر شية اللون والعلامة والخطوط المخالفة للون الأصل والزخرفة (وشي)، واصفاً البقرة الصفراء بالسلامة والخلو من أي لون آخر يشوبها (لا شية فيها).
rawText: شِيَةٌ Any colour differing from the main colour of a horse, &c.; a colour differing from the rest, (S,) or from that which generally pervades a thing. === لَا شِيَةَ فِيهِ It is of one generally pervading colour, in which is no other colour. === شِيَةٌ [also] A mark, sign, symptom, or token, by which a thing is known; syn. عَلَامَةٌ; (Msb;) and مَخِيلَةٌ, which see. شِيَوِىٌّ : see what next follows. قَوْلٌ مَوْشِىٌّ بِهِ [A saying misrepresented]. (TA in art. قت, in an explanation of قَوْلٌ مَقْتُوتٌ.) === مَوْشِىٌّ is used by Aboo-Dhu-eyb to signify A musical reed-pipe. (TA, art. نوب.) وَشَوِىٌّ rel. n. of شِيَةٌ, the rad. و being restored; (S in the present art.;) and so 🡻شِيَوِىٌّ, like عِدَوِىٌّ [of عِدَةٌ]. (S in art. وعد.) وَشَى 1 , inf. n. وَشْىٌ, He variegated, or figured, a piece of cloth, or a garment; (Mgh, Msb, * K;) and embellished it. (K.) === وَشَى بِهِ إِلَى السُّلْطَانِ, (S, K,) or عِنْدَ السُّلْطَانِ, (Msb,) He calumniated, or misrepresented, him to the Sultán. (S, Msb, K.) وَشْىٌ , originally an inf. n., A kind of variegated, or figured, cloth, or garment. (Mgh, Msb. *) === وَشْىٌ The variegation, figured work, or figuring, of a garment; making it partycoloured. === وَشى sometimes signifies A natural diversity of colours: see رُمْلَةٌ. === وَشْىٌ of a sword: see فِرِنْدٌ.
